targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN prob = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `Saudáveis`,
  SUM(CASE WHEN prob > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `Com problemas`
FROM (
  SELECT h.hostid,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.triggerid) FROM triggers t
       INNER JOIN functions f ON f.triggerid = t.triggerid
       INNER JOIN items i ON i.itemid = f.itemid
       WHERE i.hostid = h.hostid AND t.value = 1 AND t.status = 0) AS prob
  FROM hosts h
  INNER JOIN hosts_groups hg ON hg.hostid = h.hostid
  WHERE hg.groupid = 663
    AND h.status = 0
    AND h.host NOT LIKE 'app-%'
    AND h.hostid IN (SELECT hostid FROM host_tag WHERE tag = 'servico' AND value = '${servico}')
  GROUP BY h.hostid
) t
